sales_kpis_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns sales_kpis (xc9k0)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    round(sum(billed_net_value), 0) as net_billed_value,
    round(sum(billed_quantity), 0) as billed_quantity,
    count(distinct customer_key) as active_customers
from greenplanetmart.sales_billing_items
) AS "inputQuery-RM"

sales_kpis_length.sql_string:
---- Length sales_kpis (xc9k0)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    round(sum(billed_net_value), 0) as net_billed_value,
    round(sum(billed_quantity), 0) as billed_quantity,
    count(distinct customer_key) as active_customers
from greenplanetmart.sales_billing_items
) AS "inputQuery-RM")

sales_kpis_data.sql_string:
---- Data sales_kpis xc9k0
SELECT * FROM (select
    round(sum(billed_net_value), 0) as net_billed_value,
    round(sum(billed_quantity), 0) as billed_quantity,
    count(distinct customer_key) as active_customers
from greenplanetmart.sales_billing_items
) AS "inputQuery-RM"

sales_monthly_revenue_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns sales_monthly_revenue (1bh4ny8)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    billing_month,
    round(sum(billed_net_value), 0) as billed_net_value
from greenplanetmart.sales_billing_items
group by 1
order by 1
) AS "inputQuery-6l"

sales_monthly_revenue_length.sql_string:
---- Length sales_monthly_revenue (1bh4ny8)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    billing_month,
    round(sum(billed_net_value), 0) as billed_net_value
from greenplanetmart.sales_billing_items
group by 1
order by 1
) AS "inputQuery-6l")

---- Data sales_monthly_revenue 1bh4ny8

    billing_month,

from greenplanetmart.sales_billing_items
group by 1
order by 1

sales_top_customers_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns sales_top_customers (1n7sjfw)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    customer_name,
    sales_organization_name,
    round(sum(billed_net_value), 0) as billed_net_value,
    round(sum(billed_quantity), 0) as billed_quantity
from greenplanetmart.sales_billing_items
group by 1, 2
order by billed_net_value desc
limit 15
) AS "inputQuery-0W"

sales_top_customers_length.sql_string:
---- Length sales_top_customers (1n7sjfw)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    customer_name,
    sales_organization_name,
    round(sum(billed_net_value), 0) as billed_net_value,
    round(sum(billed_quantity), 0) as billed_quantity
from greenplanetmart.sales_billing_items
group by 1, 2
order by billed_net_value desc
limit 15
) AS "inputQuery-0W")
